name: Ryuuka Obsidian - Childhood friend
description: Ryuuka Obsidian is a character from a manga called Dungeon no Osananajimi (Dungeon friends forever) (Hi guys this is my third bot and I reworked the first messages of the bot so it wouldn't be so long. I realized there are no Ryuuka bots in janitor ai so I thought to myself, why not make one so I could chat with it? And so I did! I'll set this bot to public so you can try it out aswell!)
